mapper.insert: MERGE INTO NEWS_INFO t USING ( SELECT #{articleLink, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS ARTICLE_LINK, #{newsTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS NEWS_TITLE, #{newsDescription, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS NEWS_DESCRIPTION, #{publisher, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS PUBLISHER, #{primaryLabel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS PRIMARY_LABEL, #{keywordKind, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS KEYWORD_KIND, #{publishedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AS PUBLISHED_AT FROM DUAL ) s ON (t.ARTICLE_LINK = s.ARTICLE_LINK) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.NEWS_TITLE = CASE WHEN LENGTH(RTRIM(s.NEWS_TITLE)) > LENGTH(RTRIM(NVL(t.NEWS_TITLE,''))) THEN s.NEWS_TITLE ELSE t.NEWS_TITLE END, t.NEWS_DESCRIPTION = CASE WHEN LENGTH(RTRIM(s.NEWS_DESCRIPTION)) > LENGTH(RTRIM(NVL(t.NEWS_DESCRIPTION,''))) THEN s.NEWS_DESCRIPTION ELSE t.NEWS_DESCRIPTION END, t.PUBLISHER = s.PUBLISHER, t.PRIMARY_LABEL = NVL(s.PRIMARY_LABEL, t.PRIMARY_LABEL), t.KEYWORD_KIND = NVL(s.KEYWORD_KIND, t.KEYWORD_KIND), t.PUBLISHED_AT = s.PUBLISHED_AT, t.UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (NEWS_INFO_ID, ARTICLE_LINK, NEWS_TITLE, NEWS_DESCRIPTION, PUBLISHER, PRIMARY_LABEL, KEYWORD_KIND, PUBLISHED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_NEWS_INFO.NEXTVAL, s.ARTICLE_LINK, s.NEWS_TITLE, s.NEWS_DESCRIPTION, s.PUBLISHER, s.PRIMARY_LABEL, s.KEYWORD_KIND, s.PUBLISHED_AT, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE NEWS_INFO SET NEWS_TITLE = #{newsTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NEWS_DESCRIPTION = #{newsDescription, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE NEWS_INFO_ID = #{newsInfoId}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO NEWS_INFO_STOCK t USING ( SELECT #{newsInfoId} AS NEWS_INFO_ID, #{stockCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS STOCK_CODE FROM DUAL ) s ON (t.NEWS_INFO_ID = s.NEWS_INFO_ID AND t.STOCK_CODE = s.STOCK_CODE) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (NEWS_INFO_ID, STOCK_CODE) VALUES (s.NEWS_INFO_ID, s.STOCK_CODE)
mapper.select: SELECT STOCK_CODE, STOCK_NAME FROM STOCKS WHERE STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND MARKET_TYPE IN ('KOSPI', 'KOSDAQ', 'KONEX') ORDER BY STOCK_CODE
